title: Zero In Knockdown Plug-In Mosquito Killer Refill – 30 ml for Plug-In Insect Killer For Home & Travel Lasts for up to 45 Nights (Pack of 3)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

MOSQUITO KILLER REFILL- Designed to work effortlessly with the Zero In Mosquito Killer plug-in unit, this powerful refill targets and eliminates mosquitoes, midges and biting insects on contact, covering areas up to 12m². Ideal for continuous insect protection at home or while travelling

ODOUR-FREE FORMULA- Keep your living space comfortable and pest-free with this mosquito killer plug-in refill. This insect killer replacement is formulated without any unpleasant smells, providing effective protection without disrupting your environment. Ideal for those sensitive to fragrances

LONG-LASTING PROTECTION - Each 30ml refill bottle of mosquito repellent contains Prallethrin and provides up to 45 nights of 8-hour continuous protection. This long-lasting formula means fewer replacements, allowing you to enjoy consistent mosquito defence with minimal maintenance

EASY TO REPLACE – Remove empty bottle and insert the refill into the existing plug-in unit (ZER740) and plug in for continuous overnight protection. The compact design of this mosquito killer plug-in unit is suitable for any room and makes it simple to maintain an insect-free space

CARING FOR PEOPLE & THE PLANET – Zero In protects your health and home against Home Pest problems with minimal environmental impact. Zero In products are ethical and welfare-friendly solutions to everyday Home Pest problems that safeguard your well-being. We care for you, your family, and the planet
description: From the manufacturer TARGETS HOUSEHOLD PESTS Zero In brings you a comprehensive range of pest control solutions for household pests, including flies, wasps, mosquitoes, bed bugs, fleas, clothes moths and more. Everything you need to live pest-free Professional-quality products you can trust Experts in pest control for over 25 years Zero In Knockdown Mosquito Killer Refill – 30ml Plug-in protection from biting insects Provide continuous protection for your family against mosquitoes, midges and other biting insects with the Zero In refill pack for the Zero In Knockdown Mosquito Killer. The discreet plug-in, reminiscent of a plug-in air freshener, releases a powerful knockdown agent to rapidly kill nuisance insects. Ideal for home, caravan and holiday travel, the plug-in diffuser provides whole-room protection that lasts up to 45 days (8 hours a day) per refill. Adaptor required for non-UK plug sockets. Kills mosquitoes, midges and other biting insects. Discreet plug-in unit provides continuous whole-room protection. Ideal for home, caravan and holiday travel. For use with Zero In Knockdown Mosquito Killer. Product Highlights Kills Biting Insects Direct plug-in unit releases a powerful knockdown agent to rapidly kill mosquitoes, midges and other biting insects. Whole-Room Protection Provides whole-room protection that lasts up to 45 days (8 hours a day) per refill. Home & Holiday Use Ideal for home, caravan and holiday travel to keep biting bugs away especially during the night. Adaptor required for non-UK sockets. All-Round Protection Zero In brings you a wide range of flying insect control solutions including traps, aerosols, electronic devices and more - everything you need for complete protection against flying insects. Zero In Travel Essentials Provide protection for your family away from home with a range of insect control that's perfect to pack into your suitcase (adaptors may be required for non-UK plug sockets).
